name: Lemon Chicken with Bitters
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Squeeze the juice from 1 lemon over the chicken.
2. In a bag, combine flour, paprika, and salt. Add the chicken pieces one at a time, shaking to coat evenly.
3. Heat oil in a large, non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Brown the chicken on all sides for about 10 minutes.
4. Place the chicken in a baking dish. Dissolve brown sugar in water; stir in bitters. Pour the mixture over the chicken. Add lemon slices and return to oven. Cover and bake for 30 minutes.
